prompt: Assess our portfolio management maturity. We have 60 active projects but no formal prioritization framework. Projects are approved based on who presents to the executive committee most convincingly.
assertions: Must identify the absence of objective prioritization criteria as a critical maturity gap
Must detect HiPPO bias and political influence as decision quality risks
Must evaluate portfolio governance effectiveness beyond just prioritization
Must recommend a structured prioritization framework with objective scoring criteria

prompt: Our CTO says 70% of our project portfolio should support digital transformation, but analysis shows only 30% of budget is allocated to digital initiatives. Assess our strategic alignment.
assertions: Must quantify the 40-point gap between stated strategic priority and actual investment
Must trace which projects consume budget that could be redirected to digital transformation
Must identify orphan projects that lack strategic alignment
Must recommend portfolio rebalancing actions to close the strategy-investment gap

prompt: Evaluate resource optimization across our portfolio. Key architects are allocated to 5+ projects simultaneously, delivery dates are slipping, and teams report constant context switching.
assertions: Must identify over-allocation of key resources as the root cause of delivery slippage
Must quantify the productivity loss from context switching across multiple projects
Must assess capacity planning practices and their effectiveness
Must recommend resource rebalancing strategies including project staggering

prompt: Review our portfolio governance. The steering committee meets quarterly, decisions take 6-8 weeks, and project managers say governance slows everything down without adding value.
assertions: Must evaluate whether quarterly governance cadence is sufficient for the portfolio dynamics
Must measure decision latency and its impact on project timelines and opportunity cost
Must assess whether governance forums produce clear actionable decisions
Must recommend governance model adjustments that improve timeliness without losing oversight
